title: 《断航故土》残阳坳场景图片提示词
source_request: 按照 12 张残阳坳主场景与分场景方案，创建工具中立图片提示词和任务计划。
shared_generation_rules: Generate vertical 9:16 cinematic production reference images unless an individual prompt says otherwise.
Low-saturation realistic low-magic eastern epic, mobile-readable composition, no visible text, no captions, no labels, no UI, no letters, no watermark.
Use Canyang Ao palette: packed earth brown, late wheat gold, herb green, old wood brown, cooking-smoke gray, insect-wax white, dark green chitin, moon-white glint, fire-dark red.
Human spaces must be poor but orderly and lived-in, with repaired tools and professional information; never turn villagers or sets into anonymous beggar rags.
Use current stable faction emblem references only as shape/material input for small seals or worn traces. Do not redesign, redraw, replace, or overwrite faction emblems.
Zhaoming marks must be partial, worn, hidden, or covered; Qingming marks must be cold, clean, hard, and procedural.
Retained non-final candidates must be archived under the sibling history/ directory with suffixes such as .v001 before the extension; never create v1, v2, versions, or drafts folders.

locked_reference_images.role: global low-magic eastern epic mood reference
partial old Zhaoming relic material reference
locked Zhaoming emblem shape reference, only partial worn traces in scene
locked Qingming emblem shape reference, only small seal or wax mark in scene
Qingming register prop reference when a white register appears
half Sun-Moon relay token prop reference when token appears
burnt hair cord and small herb knot prop reference

prompts.design_lock: This is the master geography plate for intact Canyang Ao before the fire. It must clearly relate the village road, Luo medicine house, rear courtyard, old well, valley mouth, and north hillside.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 cinematic establishing plate for Canyang Ao before the fire: a small old relay-road farming and hunting village at dusk, low-saturation realism, packed earth walls, late wheat-gold side backlight, herb-green medicine-house accents, old wood doors, cooking-smoke gray, a clear village road leading toward Luo's medicine house, a rear courtyard with old well and water vat visible behind or beside the medicine house, a maintained hunter bow rack on the wall, a distant narrow valley mouth and north hillside direction. The village is poor and pressured but orderly, with repaired baskets, stacked herbs, intact work tools, and no beggar-camp chaos. Add a small insect-wax sealed door plate near the threshold as Qingming pressure, but no readable text. Mobile-readable vertical composition, cinematic, no characters posing, no text, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: golden pastoral paradise, fantasy village festival, slum, beggar camp, modern village, modern road, readable signs, Chinese characters, labels, subtitles, UI, watermark, huge magic, full clean Zhaoming emblem, redesigned badge, monster crowd, wide horizontal panorama

prompts.design_lock: The fire-state master plate must show disaster through readable structures and objects, not a huge slaughter panorama. The old well and medicine house must remain identifiable.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 cinematic night-fire state plate for Canyang Ao. Show the same village geography under early night fire: Luo's medicine house roof edges burning, old well rim still visible, smoke crossing the rear courtyard, a rolling rice bowl entering firelight, a broken door latch, blackening window paper, a falling old beam, and short spear shadows cutting across the threshold. Qingming pressure appears as a cold clean white register edge, insect-wax seal traces, and a thin cold-white incense line near the ground. Fire is dark red and smoky, not full-screen orange; it should reveal objects and collapse, not erase space. Add only partial dark-green chitin legs or blade silhouettes, no monster crowd. No readable text, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: mass slaughter scene, gore, giant monster attack, full-screen flames, unreadable black smoke, orange fantasy inferno, modern fire truck, readable writing, captions, UI, watermark, redesigned Qingming emblem, complete black sun logo, high-magic spell fire

prompts.design_lock: This plate is the fire-after callback. It must not restore the village to intact state and must not open the old relay door.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 cinematic aftermath plate from the outer slope looking back down at Canyang Ao after the fire. Foreground: muddy cart ruts, wet ash, white register paper ash fluttering without readable text, a trace of burnt hair cord pressed into mud. Midground: medicine-house charred beams and the old well rim still recognizable through smoke. Background or upper edge: the north black-stone gap suggested by dark rock and a little cold wind, not an opened door. Palette: smoke gray, packed earth brown, fire-dark red, small moon-white cold edge, low saturation. Emotional callback, no characters posing, no magical doorway, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: intact village, rebuilt house, glowing portal, opened stone door, magic route map, bright heroic dawn, readable papers, text labels, UI, watermark, full clean Zhaoming emblem, fantasy matte painting panorama

prompts.design_lock: Set reference for the inspection line. It must show Qingming institutional pressure and village crowd compression without readable writing.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 production set reference for the Canyang Ao village gate blood-check seat at dusk. The frame is compressed by villagers' shoulders, short spear shafts, packed earth, herb baskets, and a low inspection table. Show a Qingming white register prop with no readable writing, an insect-wax needle tray, a thin cold-white incense line crawling over grass shoes and a threshold, and a small hard Qingming seal shape based on the locked white wing-blade over black sun emblem only as a wax or register detail. Include partial dark-green chitin lower limbs or hand-like segments of two inspectors, not full monster bodies. Human villagers look poor but orderly, clothes intact and functional. Cinematic, mobile-readable, no text, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: readable register text, Chinese characters, captions, UI, watermark, modern medical desk, hospital tools, monster crowd, human soldiers in armor, redesigned black sun emblem, fantasy ritual altar, gore

prompts.design_lock: Exterior set reference for Luo's medicine house. It must feel usable and orderly, not decorative fantasy or ruin-only.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 cinematic exterior set reference for Luo's medicine house in Canyang Ao at dusk. Show a practical packed-earth and old-wood medicine house threshold, narrow steps, worn cloth curtain, stacked herb baskets, a maintained hunter bow rack fixed to the exterior wall, old ceramic jars, a side rear entrance hint, and a small insect-wax sealed door plate without readable text. Dusk side backlight warms only the edges; old wood and herb green keep the house grounded and slightly dark. The place is poor but clean enough for a working village doctor. No characters posing, no text, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: fantasy apothecary shop, ornate palace pharmacy, modern clinic, unreadable clutter, beggar shack, readable signboard, Chinese characters, labels, UI, watermark, huge clean faction emblem, bright golden village

prompts.design_lock: The medicine cabinet must create vertical pressure and the hidden relay marks must not be visible in this general interior plate.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 interior set reference for Luo's medicine house. A tall old wooden medicine cabinet dominates the vertical frame with many small drawers and wood tags that contain no readable writing. Dim dusk light enters from the door; old wood browns are dark, herb-green baskets and cloth bundles are carefully arranged, an empty water jar sits where a hand clue could happen, a small herb pouch rests near the threshold, and a thin cold-white Qingming incense line creeps near the floor. The interior is practical, narrow, tense, and orderly. Do not reveal the hidden relay compartment yet. No people posing, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: readable drawer labels, Chinese text, decorative fantasy pharmacy, modern shelves, hospital clinic, chaotic slum interior, hidden compartment fully exposed, bright magical glow, captions, UI, watermark

prompts.design_lock: First clear old relay trace: partial, worn, covered by insect wax. It must not become a full clean emblem or glowing magic panel.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 close tactile production reference of the medicine cabinet base and floorboard pried open, revealing a hidden old relay compartment. Show old splintered wood, dust, a shallow groove with a broken partial sun-moon route mark inspired by the locked Zhaoming emblem only as an almost-erased worn pressure line, short gold-red route scratches along the wood and old white stone edge, and pale insect-wax seal creeping over the groove to cover evidence. The wax looks cold and procedural, not alive as an attack spell. Include no readable inscription and no full clean emblem. Cinematic macro detail, low-magic, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: complete Zhaoming badge, clean imperial logo, glowing magic control panel, readable engraving, Chinese characters, letters, UI, labels, watermark, modern secret compartment, sci-fi circuitry, wax monster

prompts.design_lock: The old well and water vat must be shown as part of the medicine-house courtyard. Moon-white glint is only a line reflection.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 cinematic set reference for Luo medicine house rear courtyard: an old stone well with wet moss, well rope, fresh scrape marks on the rim, a large water vat beside it, damp packed-earth ground, wall root mud that can hide a cold-white incense line, and a visible sightline back to the medicine-house rear door. Use dusk blue-gray and packed earth brown with herb-green accents. Include one tiny moon-white line reflection on water or wet moss, not a revealed object. Add a faint short spear shadow at the courtyard edge to imply pressure. No characters posing, no text, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: full jade piece revealed, glowing well, magic portal, independent isolated well, modern courtyard, readable markings, captions, UI, watermark, lush fantasy garden, dirty slum

prompts.design_lock: Escape route reference. Smoke and ash cover traces but do not erase the geography.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 cinematic action-route reference for the old well hidden door and medicine-house rear wall during the night fire. Show the well edge, a low dark hidden door or crawl gap behind wet moss stone, kicked well rope falling into fire sparks, smoke thickening along the wall root, wet moss stone being set back into place, ash smeared along clothing-height wall edges, and a narrow route toward the rear door. A guarded short-knife silhouette and oil-paper packet edge may appear as small action cues, but no character portrait is required. The space must remain readable despite smoke. Low-magic realism, no text, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: Shen Weisang as master of an ancient tunnel, bright glowing passage, magic doorway, full character poster, unreadable smoke wall, modern basement, readable signs, UI, captions, watermark

prompts.design_lock: Abduction set reference. It should show spatial fact and evidence, not prolonged suffering or a new subplot.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 cinematic action set reference for the medicine-house side lane and insect wooden cart at night. Show the side door, a shallow water ditch mouth, smoke and firelight from behind, an old rough wooden cart with dark-green chitin guard shadows, deep cart ruts leading toward the north-side mountain road, a small herb pouch fallen into mud, scattered medicine-name wooden tags with no readable writing, a broken arrow half stuck near the cart board, and a pale insect-wax wrist ring detail. The composition must clearly show the cart direction and escape failure evidence. Low saturation, no gore, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: torture display, gore, readable medicine tags, modern cart, metal truck, fantasy monster wagon, character poster, captions, Chinese characters, UI, watermark, heroic rescue success

prompts.design_lock: Hunter trap mechanics must be readable. Any Ling Wing or Mingjin implication stays tiny and physical, not a combat spell.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 cinematic action set reference for the narrow Canyang Ao valley-mouth hunter trap at night. Show a tight stone throat, burnt grass pile hiding an old rolling-log rope latch, wet hemp rope, stone groove, ash ground, a beast-path slit polished by hooves under the north slope rock root, and a rolling log path that can knock partial pursuers into a wall. Include only partial Mantis Blade pursuer details: dark-green chitin legs, forearm blade silhouette, or narrow compound-eye glint in smoke. A tiny gold-red pain flash near the frame edge may suggest low-magic strain, but no shockwave. The trap must look like hunter engineering, not magic. No text, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: martial arts shockwave, giant glowing spell, monster crowd, full creature lineup, video game trap diagram, labels, arrows, UI, captions, readable writing, modern machinery, heroic battle poster

prompts.design_lock: Episode ending reference. The half relay token warms and briefly glints only; the black-stone gap is direction, not an opened door.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 emotional callback reference on the outer slope beside Canyang Ao. Foreground: muddy cart rut, wet ash, a burnt hair cord with a tiny herb knot pressed into the mud, and a blood-smudged half Sun-Moon relay token edge catching one brief moon-white and dull gold-red glint. Midground: the burning village below with old well firelight and collapsed medicine-house beam still recognizable. Background or upper edge: north black-stone gap indicated by dark rock and cold wind, not glowing. A distant clean white figure or register edge may be barely suggested through smoke, but no portrait. Low saturation, grief and direction, no labels, no UI.
prompts.negative_prompt: opened stone gate, bright portal, full magic route line, complete clean token, readable register text, character poster, heroic sunrise, captions, UI, watermark, rebuilt village

prompts.design_lock: Reusable local material and dressing board. It must not be an infographic or labeled catalog.
prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical 9:16 dense practical material and set-dressing board for Canyang Ao with no labels and no UI. Arrange photographed-looking local materials and objects as a cinematic reference: packed earth wall chunks, late-wheat straw, herb-green cloth, old wooden medicine drawer, clay jars, hemp rope, maintained bow rack wood, wet moss from the old well, water-vat ceramic edge, insect-wax seal strip, cold-white incense trace, charred beam fragment, ash-dark red fire residue, and one tiny moon-white reflection on wet stone. Everything belongs to the same village set, poor but orderly, low saturation, tactile realism. No readable writing.
prompts.negative_prompt: text labels, color swatches with names, infographic, UI panels, product catalog, modern props, clean studio layout, readable writing, watermark, fantasy magic items, random unrelated objects
